Details:
In studies with Filtrasorb 400, simazine was found to have adsorption capacities that would be cost-effective in full-scale treatment.  Adsorption capacities were lower in field waters with background organics competing with simazine for adsorption. [502, 1486]
In studies with two commercially available powdered activated carbons (PACs), adsorption capacities for simazine were generally higher than for deethylsimazine. [1428]
